Label: SP:1
Description: Very small task or bug fix – typically less than 1 hour of work

Label: SP:5
Description: Larger feature – multiple steps or files

Label: SP:8
Description: Complex feature or integration – might involve research or coordination

Label: SP:13
Description: Very large story – multiple components or significant uncertainty

Label: SP:21
Description: Huge or epic story – should likely be broken down into smaller parts

Label: SP:∞
Description: Unestimated – needs grooming or is too vague to assign a point value
